CalcDomain
Finance & BusinessEngineering & ConstructionMath & ScienceHealth & Sport

Semantic calculator library

Data-driven hubs, clusters, breadcrumb-ready URLs, and structured data. This prototype currently ships 10 calculators mapped into 23 clusters across four hubs.

Predictive, faceted search (hub/cluster/tool)
i18n-ready (/en/, more locales later) Breadcrumb + WebApplication + HowTo + FAQ JSON-LD Silo URLs: /en/{hub}/{cluster}/{tool}

Latest calculators (sample)

Deep links for fast access; search above filters these cards live.

Reviewed formulas Low CLS / fast LCP Sticky results on mobile
Millimeters to Inches Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert millimeters to inches with fractional output, sig figs, and the exact 25.4 mm standard.
Typography Unit Converter (px, pt, em, rem, %)
Math & Science · Tipografia & CSS Units

Convert typography units with live preview, relative vs absolute guidance, and accessibility context.
Kilograms to Pounds Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert kilograms to pounds, highlight mass vs weight, and show planetary gravity effects.
Centimeters to Inches Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert centimeters to inches with fractional output, feet+inches helper, and visual ruler.
Pounds to Kilograms Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert pounds to kilograms with imperial context, slug unit mention, and gravity insights.
BTU to kWh Converter
Engineering & Construction · Termotecnica & HVAC

Convert BTU <-> kWh with clear separation of energy vs power and HVAC-ready examples.
Angstrom to Nanometer Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert A <-> nm with scientific notation for spectroscopy, crystallography, and nano-tech.
Kelvin to Fahrenheit Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert K <-> F with zero-absolute context, combined formula, and scale comparisons.
Degrees to Radians Converter
Math & Science · Conversione Unita

Convert degrees <-> radians with a unit-circle visual, pi multiples, and trig outputs.
Cups to Tablespoons Converter
Health & Sport · Everyday & Cucina

Convert cups <-> tablespoons with regional standards, mL output, and a dry vs liquid warning.
CalcDomain · Semantic calculators with hubs, clusters, and deep topical linking.
